signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 Annual Inflation at 2.2% YoY | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate rose to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in the prior two months, below market forecasts of 2.4%, as reported by Statistics Korea via Trading Economics[1]. signals.raw: **Market Impact**: This confirmed escalation—directly announced by Trump and reported in real-time analysis—would likely move prediction markets on Iran conflict resolution (e.g., ceasefire holding), oil prices, or US-Iran military action, as it signals failed diplomacy and heightened conflict risk over a critical chokepoint for 20% of global oil supply**[1]**.
